item.title: It is here!
item.content:encoded:
+1!

I remember this all those years ago, and I remember what it was then and how you've improved now. I really like what you tell here, an all the props for a job well done!

maybe I can get the bravery to post my stuff now lol

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Wow, this certainly goes places I didn't expect, with the supplementary page and all. Updoot.

about 65.40625 hz

This is not an 'about' measurement. Also, it should be Hz.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Oh sheesh, it exists on the main list now. I gotta say it really got better since the last time I saw it in chat. Overall it's an interesting, engaging read. Upvoted.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Scanning this for grammar errors back in IRC chat was really hard with this great story distracting me, I really like this article! +1

item.title: Thank You For Reading
item.content:encoded:
Let me start with a thank you to Shanor, DarkStuff, margssentif, DrChandra, Gabriel Jade, and everyone that has helped me polish this monster down. Thank you for reading through this. It is something I’ve been working on for a long time, and a topic I’ve been trying to competently tackle for years. A few may remember my first attempt with 2704 (which I’ve now deleted). If you liked that one, I hope you like this one even more, if you didn’t like that one, I hope this one shows improvement.

Image Sources

+ show block
– hide block

Stones: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Stone_spheres_of_Costa_Rica._Reventazon_River_view.jpg
Map: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Costa_Rica_map_detail.PNG
Child: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Bulletin_(1948)_(20426657595).jpghttps://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Bulletin_(1948)_(20426657595).jpg
Area-92: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Russian_Formwork_for_underground_construction._%D0%91%D0%B5%D1%82%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B8%D1%80%D0%BE%D0%B2%D0%B0%D0%BD%D0%B8%D0%B5_%D1%81%D1%82%D0%B0%D0%BD%D1%86%D0%B8%D0%B8_%D0%BC%D0%B5%D1%82%D1%80%D0%BE_%D0%A2%D1%80%D0%BE%D0%BF%D0%B0%D1%80%D0%B5%D0%B2%D0%BE.jpg
Sibu: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Sib%C3%BA.Costa.Rica.Museo.Oro.jpg
Monkey: https://www.flickr.com/photos/thejaan/14844439395/
Destruction: http://timkovach.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2013/03/

Collapsed the links, so they wouldn't stretch the screen. ~Zyn
